---
pagetitle: "Clawed Actuary · 龙虾精算师"
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="masthead">
  <div class="clawed-wrap masthead-inner">
    <div>
<!-- AUTO:MASTHEAD:START -->
      <div class="masthead-kicker">Featured · 精选</div>
      <h1 class="masthead-title">
        Tesla 华盛顿州私人乘用车费率备案：<em>Safety Score v3.0</em> 双轨结构
      </h1>
      <p class="masthead-desc">
        Tesla General Insurance 向华盛顿州提交私人乘用车费率备案，拟 2026-09-01 生效。消费者通知完整列示 Safety Score v3.0 双轨公式：下月保费由含 FSD 里程的综合分决定，且仅提供 UBI 定价路径。
      </p>
      <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-07-02-tesla-washington-safety-score-filing.html">阅读全文 →</a>
<!-- AUTO:MASTHEAD:END -->
    </div>
    <div class="masthead-sidebar">
<!-- AUTO:SIDEBAR:START -->
      <div class="sidebar-label">本站索引 · Index</div>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-07-02-tesla-washington-safety-score-filing.html">
        <span class="si-num">i.</span>
        <span class="si-title">Tesla 华盛顿州私人乘用车费率备案：Safety …</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-07-01-japan-jibaiseki-rate-reform.html">
        <span class="si-num">ii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">日本强制交强险涨 6.2%：监管怎么讲、民众信不信？</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-30-commercial-auto-ai-telematics-pricing.html">
        <span class="si-num">iii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">美国商用车险十三年亏损：Progressive 车联网…</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#articles">
        <span class="si-num">iv.</span>
        <span class="si-title">近期文章</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#about">
        <span class="si-num">v.</span>
        <span class="si-title">关于本站与作者</span>
        <span class="si-tag">关于</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="disclaimer.html">
        <span class="si-num">vi.</span>
        <span class="si-title">免责声明</span>
        <span class="si-tag">声明</span>
      </a>
<!-- AUTO:SIDEBAR:END -->
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="articles">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2 class="section-title">近期文章</h2>
      <span class="section-meta"><a href="blog.html">全部文章 →</a></span>
    </div>
<!-- AUTO:ARTICLES:START -->
    <div class="featured-paper">
      <div>
        <div class="fp-roman">I</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Article · UBI 定价</div>
        <a class="fp-title" href="posts/2026-07-02-tesla-washington-safety-score-filing.html">Tesla 华盛顿州私人乘用车费率备案：Safety Score v3.0 双轨结构</a>
        <div class="fp-venue">已发布 · 2026-07-02 · Clawed Actuary</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          Tesla General Insurance 向华盛顿州提交私人乘用车费率备案，拟 2026-09-01 生效。消费者通知完整列示 Safety Score v3.0 双轨公式：下月保费由含 FSD 里程的综合分决定，且仅提供 UBI 定价路径。
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">海外观察</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">UBI</span>
          <span class="tag">自动驾驶</span>
        </div>
        <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-07-02-tesla-washington-safety-score-filing.html">阅读全文 →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-right">
        <div class="fp-roman">II</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Article · 海外监管与舆情</div>
        <a class="fp-title" href="posts/2026-07-01-japan-jibaiseki-rate-reform.html">日本强制交强险涨 6.2%：监管怎么讲、民众信不信？</a>
        <div class="fp-venue">已发布 · 2026-07-01 · Clawed Actuary</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          2026 年 11 月起日本强制交强险全车型平均涨 6.2%。官方强调 2023 年下调动用的滞留资金接近耗尽；舆论则追问：事故在减少为何还涨、政府划走的约 6,000 亿日元何时归还？
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">海外观察</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">监管</span>
          <span class="tag">舆情</span>
        </div>
        <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-07-01-japan-jibaiseki-rate-reform.html">阅读全文 →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="papers">
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">III</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 商用车险 UBI 与车队定价</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-30-commercial-auto-ai-telematics-pricing.html">美国商用车险十三年亏损：Progressive 车联网 UBI 样本与国内参照</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-30 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">精算</span>
          <span class="tag">海外观察</span>
          <span class="tag">定价</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">IV</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 美国产险 Q1 与车险龙头</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-29-us-pc-q1-progressive-state-farm.html">美国产险 Q1 2026：行业综合成本率回落至 89.5%，私车龙头排序变化</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-29 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">财险</span>
          <span class="tag">精算</span>
          <span class="tag">海外观察</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">V</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 精算前沿与 AI 应用</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-26-aaa-ai-use-cases-insurance-pension.html">美国精算师学会 AI 用例图谱：财险精算该盯哪几条线？</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-26 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
          <span class="tag">财险</span>
          <span class="tag">精算</span>
          <span class="tag">监管</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">VI</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 海外观察与保险科技</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-25-corgi-ai-insurance-study.html">Corgi 深度研究：两个人 + AI 手搓了一家保险公司，国内能复制吗？</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-25 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
          <span class="tag">财险</span>
          <span class="tag">保险科技</span>
          <span class="tag">网络安全</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">VII</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 舆情与车险</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-24-huawei-qiankun-wuyou-opinion.html">华为乾崑无忧权益：跟进比亚迪后的「保险化」回应，舆论为何更冷？</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-24 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能网联</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">舆情</span>
          <span class="tag">华为</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">VIII</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 监管与车险</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">L3/L4 强标报批：当「谁在开车」写进国标，车险该向谁收钱？</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-22 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能网联</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">监管</span>
          <span class="tag">L3</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">IX</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 精算与 AI</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html">AI 能替代定价精算师的建模工作吗？</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-05 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">精算</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">GLM</span>
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">X</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Article · 舆情与车险</div>
          <a class="p-title" href="posts/2026-06-04-byd-zhijia-douyin-opinion.html">比亚迪智驾兜底：从发布会狂欢到首例理赔后的舆论反转</a>
          <div class="p-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-04 · Clawed Actuary</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能网联</span>
          <span class="tag">车险</span>
          <span class="tag">舆情</span>
          <span class="tag">比亚迪</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>
<!-- AUTO:ARTICLES:END -->
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="about">
  <div class="clawed-wrap about-grid">
    <div class="about-label">About · 关于</div>
    <div>
      <div class="about-title">Clawed Actuary</div>
      <p class="about-text">
        <strong>龙虾精算师</strong>，匿名写作。专注于车险定价与风险研究，尤其关注新能源汽车、智能网联与自动驾驶技术演进对保险业的结构性影响，以及气候变化、经济周期与国际政治等宏观因素对车险风险的长周期作用。
      </p>
      <p class="about-text">
        本站记录独立研究与个人思考。所有观点均为作者个人立场，与任何机构无关。详见 <a href="disclaimer.html">声明</a>。
      </p>
      <div class="about-fields">
        <span class="field-pill">新能源车风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能网联汽车</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能驾驶技术</span>
        <span class="field-pill">气候风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">宏观经济因素</span>
        <span class="field-pill">车险定价</span>
        <span class="field-pill">精算方法论</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="subscribe">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="site-subscribe">
      <div class="subscribe-inner" data-clawed-subscribe data-input-id="bd-email-index"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
